name: hook-control-slipping
prompt: Close-up on young woman with long silver hair, face half in shadow. Ice blue eyes wide with barely contained panic. Composure cracking. One hand raised near her face, frost crystals forming and melting on trembling fingertips. Control failing visibly. Dark radiating lines behind — world falling apart. Desperation beneath the ice queen mask. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Internal thought from Rei, close-up on her face, place thought bubble TOP-RIGHT as internal monologue

sfx.description: soft crystalline cracking, ice fracturing quietly, delicate shattering
